seed.question: Based on the table on page 41, in column "1990", compute the percentage by which the value in row "Net Emissions (Sources and Sinks)" (5560.2) differs from the value in row "Total Gross Emissions (Sources)" (6536.9). Report only the final result as a signed percentage with two decimals.
